_comment_for_humans: Local dev MCP. The returns-triage-mock server is a FastMCP wrapper over specs/sample-data/*.json exposing oms_get_order, returns_get_case, returns_list_open, customer_get_profile, returns_apply_decision. Replace with the real OMS / returns-DB / customer-profile endpoints when they become accessible (see specs/sample-data/README.md).
